race.comment: MONIX (3) has drawn wide but will drop out and storm home. Aided by a hectic pace up front and on the last run where he charged home to score he looks a top chance again. STARMAE (5) has been out of the winners list for a long time and off the scene for a while but has won fresh and presents fitter for a solid jump-out. Drawn for a soft run and should be right in this. SIOUX WARRIOR (7) has been going well over the border including a last-start win at Balaklava. Will be winding up strongly. RAGING MONKEY (11) is a veteran sprinter who looked close to a win with back to back placings before a disappointing run over the sharper dash at Swan Hill latest. Has the claim and a will give a sight on speed.
